name: cli-provider-router
description: Route any AI CLI (claude/codex/opencode) to a different upstream provider per invocation — by injecting spawn env. Includes Responses↔Chat protocol proxy for codex→chat-only providers. Library + CLI.

scripts.lint: find lib cli test -name '*.js' -type f -exec node --check {} +
scripts.test:scripts: bash -n scripts/install.sh scripts/upgrade.sh scripts/uninstall.sh && node test/scripts-static.test.js

author: lsjwzh
